{{Infobox artifact
| name = Meira's scythe
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Meira]] carries a [[scythe]] with a blade of [[life]]-fire.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Meira's scythe]] has [[green flame]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Meira's scythe]] fell to the stone with a notched and pitted haft.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
